_meta.description: Complete animation specification for all Cocos Creator animation clips. Durations sourced from art-tokens.json animation field.

animations.name: tile-connect
animations.description: Tile connection highlight animation. Plays when the player taps/selects a tile that forms a valid connection.
trigger_conditions: Player taps a tile to begin a chain
Each tile added to an active connection chain
Tile highlighted as a valid continuation

integration_notes.notes: Load via cc.AnimationClip asset reference. Play on the tile's cc.Animation component. Does not loop — plays once per connection event.

animations.name: tile-disappear
animations.description: Tile disappear animation with squash and stretch. Plays when a matched tile is removed from the board.
trigger_conditions: Tile is part of a successfully matched chain
Bomb special tile explosion clears adjacent tiles
Board clear event removes all remaining tiles

integration_notes.notes: Register an onFinished callback to remove the node from the scene graph after the animation completes. Trigger score particles from the BoardEffectController at t=0.12s (squash peak). Stagger disappear animations by 30ms per tile in a chain for visual delight.

animations.name: combo-popup
animations.description: Combo multiplier number popup animation. Base clip uses ×2 intensity. Scale peak and label size multipliers vary by combo level.

keyframe_summary.positionY: -20 → 0 → 0 → +30 (float upward, accent rise in final phase)

trigger_conditions: Player completes a chain of 3+ tiles for the first time in a burst
Subsequent chains in the same burst increment the combo counter
Combo popup appears at the centroid of the matched tile group

integration_notes.notes: Instantiate from a prefab pool. Set the label text (×2, ×3 etc.) before playing. Adjust scale_peak and label fontSize at runtime based on intensity_levels table. Use cc.tween or cc.AnimationClip.play(). Recycle node to pool in onFinished callback. Screen-space coordinates: spawn at world position of tile group center, convert to canvas space.

animations.name: area-restore-sequence
animations.description: Full island area restoration cinematic sequence. 4 sequential stages from desaturated gray to fully restored, glowing color.

stages.label: Gray to Color
stages.description: ColorOverlay child node transitions from gray (rgb 180,180,180) to white, revealing the saturated color sprite beneath.

stages.label: Details / Particles Appear
stages.description: DetailLayer child node fades in (opacity 0→255). Particle systems for ambient effects (leaves, sparkles) triggered via animation event onRestoreStageStart('stage2_details_appear').

stages.label: Glow Pulse
stages.description: GlowLayer child node pulses (opacity 0→255→0, scale 1.0→1.08→1.0) creating a bloom effect. Corresponds to area_glow_pulse_period token.

stages.label: Settle to Final State
stages.description: Root scale has a final micro-pulse (1.0→1.05→1.0). All layers settle. Animation ends with the area in its final restored state.

keyframe_summary.root.scale: 1.0 (all stages) → 1.05 at t=4.5 → 1.0 at t=5.0 (final micro-pulse)

animations.easing: cubicOut for color transition, cubicInOut for glow pulse
trigger_conditions: Player completes all objectives for an island area
Final puzzle in an area chapter is solved
Triggered by AreaManager after victory confirmation dialog

required_child_nodes: ColorOverlay — cc.Sprite with a white texture, color property animated
GlowLayer — cc.Sprite with additive blend mode for bloom effect
DetailLayer — cc.Node containing detail sprites and particle systems
integration_notes.notes: Attach this AnimationClip to the area root node's cc.Animation component. Listen to animation events via cc.Animation.on('lastframe', ...) or per-frame event callbacks registered with cc.AnimationState. The onRestoreStageStart event params can be used to trigger particle systems on the DetailLayer. Camera should gently zoom in (scale 1.0→1.05) in sync with stage 3 for dramatic effect — implement in AreaRestoreController, not in this clip. Play a chapter-specific ambient sound at t=0 and the 'restore complete' jingle at t=4.5.

global_settings.coordinate_system: Cocos Creator 3.x (Y-up, origin at node pivot)
global_settings.scale_type: Uniform scale unless explicitly noted as scaleX/scaleY
global_settings.easing_library: Cocos Creator built-in: linear, cubicIn, cubicOut, cubicInOut; custom cubic-bezier via cc.easing
